_comment: Land of the Ancient God dimension type — Tu Si's 3-level corpse realm. Canon (CANON_RI_COMPLETE_WORLD.md L48): no natural light (inside a corpse), no ceiling (the corpse is vast), no weather, no day/night. Has a fixed dim ambient light from residual Ancient God energy. Enclosed organic environment. monster_spawn_light_level: 0 (monsters spawn regardless — the realm is inherently hostile). Prime Directive: these properties are objective — they exist because this IS the inside of an 8-star Ancient God's body.
